title: Voice Transcript
description: An addon for Simple Voice Chat that adds live transcripts and customizable chat bubbles.
body:
# Voice Transcript

This is an addon for [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat). Before downloading please check the instructions on how to use the mod below.
This mod uses VOSK offline speech recognition and currently supports these languages: 


English, Chinese, Russian, French, German, Spanish, Portuguese/Brazilian Portuguese, Greek, Turkish, Vietnamese, Italian, Dutch, Catalan, Arabic/Arabic Tunisian, Farsi, Filipino, Ukrainian, Kazakh, Swedish, Japanese, Esperanto, Hindi, Czech, Polish, Uzbek, Korean, Breton, Gujarati, Tajik and Telugu.

---

## How to install
### 1.
Make sure you have the latest [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) mod version and the latest Voice Transcript mod version.

### 2.
Go inside your config folder, and search for a folder called "voicetranscript-model", if you can't find it, create it.

### 3.
Download your desired voice language model, here you can search for your language:
https://alphacephei.com/vosk/models

If you are going to speak in English, I recommend using [this model](https://alphacephei.com/vosk/models/vosk-model-small-en-us-0.15.zip) here.
Keep in mind that using more large language models requires a stronger PC on your server-side. 

### 4.
Extract the files inside the voicetranscript-model. Make sure to extract the files, and not create a new folder with the files inside it. Your voicetranscript-model folder needs to look like this:
![Image of how it needs to look like](https://i.imgur.com/0IwuH1f.png)

---

## Customizing
### Chat Bubbles Color
You can change the chat bubbles color using the command: /bubblecolor <color>

![Image of in-game chat bubbles](https://i.imgur.com/WjgZCcK.png)
